staticText: Route users to the private Crypto Scam Red-Flag Checklist and Evidence Pack without requesting, prefilling, repeating or transmitting an incident label, date, platform, contact reference, wallet information, story, evidence, timeline or loss entry. The route performs no database lookup, report submission, moderation, verification, risk score or safety decision. It only organizes user-entered evidence locally and can export local files. Never ask for or echo a private key, seed phrase, password or one-time code, and never label a person, address, platform or transaction safe, fraudulent or verified.
